# Euclid Insights - Copilot Instructions

Refer to `CLAUDE.md` in the project root for the complete style guide, brand colors, image conventions, and architecture reference.

## Quick Reference

- **Writing**: Google style guide — sentence-case headings, second person, active voice, present tense
- **Colors**: euclid-teal (#0AB3B3), euclid-navy (#273171), euclid-teal-dark (#014745)
- **Fonts**: Poppins (headings), Roboto (body), Roboto Slab (quotes)
- **Cover images**: Flat geometric monochromatic SVGs in `public/images/covers/`
- **Stock images**: Download locally to `public/images/articles/`, never hotlink
- **Dark sections**: Add `not-prose` class to prevent prose style overrides
- **Env vars**: Use `process.env` at runtime, not `import.meta.env`
- **Header logo**: `Logo-Icon-Transparent-BG.png` — don't change
- **Footer/favicon logo**: `cropped-Logo-Icon-Transparent-shadow.png`
